articles.description: TL;DR Ondo Finance will integrate its OUSG token, backed by U.S. Treasury bonds, into the XRP Ledger (XRPL) network within the next six months. The integration will allow institutions to mint and redeem OUSG instantly using the RLUSD stablecoin, ensuring continuous liquidity and operational efficiency. The tokenization of real-world assets has surpassed $3.5 billion, highlighting ... Read...

articles.description: Ondo Finance will launch its OUSG fund on the XRP Ledger. The partnership with Ripple expands accessibility to tokenized US Treasuries funds to institutional investors.
